title: AXSideMenuItemClickEvent
description: Click event emitted by a side menu item.

sections.title: Event Definition
sections.description: Shape of side menu item click event.

props.name: handled
props.description: Mark as true to prevent default toggle behavior.

props.name: nativeEvent
props.description: Underlying native event. Inherited from NXNativeEvent.

props.name: sender
props.description: Component that emitted the event. Inherited from NXEvent.
